---
pagetitle: "Submit - Architecture 2.0"
description: "Propose tools, datasets, benchmarks, and artifacts for the maintainer-reviewed Architecture 2.0 registry."
format:
  html:
    page-layout: custom
    toc: false
---

```{=html}
<div class="site-wrap submit-page">
<header class="site-masthead">
  <span class="pill">Architecture 2.0</span>
  <span class="pill hot">Maintainer-reviewed submissions</span>
</header>

<section class="site-hero">
  <div class="hub-kicker">Submit</div>
  <h1>Submit an artifact</h1>
  <p class="subtitle">Add tools, datasets, benchmarks, loops, and examples to the Architecture 2.0 registry.</p>
</section>

<p class="site-lede">
Use this page to prepare a structured artifact record. The public card stays
compact, but the full record gives maintainers enough information to review fit,
credit authors, and preserve metadata for future detail pages or artifact hubs.
The current static site opens the prepared GitHub form so the same automated
workflow can create the registry pull request.
</p>

<div class="artifact-submit-layout">
  <form id="submission-form" class="submit-form">
    <section class="submit-section">
      <h2>Public card</h2>
      <div class="artifact-submit-two">
        <label>
          <span>Tool or artifact name <b>*</b></span>
          <input name="tool_name" required placeholder="gem5">
        </label>
        <label>
          <span>Repository or website URL <b>*</b></span>
          <input name="url" required type="url" placeholder="https://github.com/...">
        </label>
      </div>
      <div class="artifact-submit-two">
        <label>
          <span>Artifact type <b>*</b></span>
          <select name="artifact_type" required>
            <option>Tool</option>
            <option>Dataset</option>
            <option>Benchmark</option>
            <option>Evaluation Harness</option>
            <option>Design Loop</option>
            <option>Tutorial or Example</option>
            <option>Other</option>
          </select>
        </label>
        <label>
          <span>Primary category <b>*</b></span>
          <select name="category" required>
            <option>Simulation</option>
            <option>Proxy Models</option>
            <option>Agentic Workflows</option>
            <option>Data Representations</option>
            <option>Verification</option>
            <option>Benchmarks and Datasets</option>
            <option>Physical Design</option>
            <option>Not sure / suggest a category</option>
          </select>
        </label>
      </div>
      <label>
        <span>Suggested category</span>
        <input name="category_suggestion" placeholder="Compiler infrastructure, EDA orchestration, design review">
      </label>
      <label>
        <span>Short description <b>*</b></span>
        <textarea name="description" required maxlength="220" rows="3" placeholder="A modular computer-system simulator for architecture feedback needing workload execution and reproducible state."></textarea>
      </label>
      <label>
        <span>Tags</span>
        <input name="tags" placeholder="simulation, reproducibility, full-system">
      </label>
    </section>

    <section class="submit-section">
      <h2>Credit</h2>
      <div class="artifact-submit-two">
        <label>
          <span>Author(s)</span>
          <input name="authors" placeholder="N. Binkert, B. Beckmann et al.">
        </label>
        <label>
          <span>Institution(s)</span>
          <input name="institution" placeholder="gem5 community">
        </label>
      </div>
      <label>
        <span>Submitted by</span>
        <input name="submitted_by" placeholder="@username or Jane Doe">
      </label>
    </section>

    <section class="submit-section">
      <h2>Artifact record</h2>
      <label>
        <span>Why does this belong in Architecture 2.0? <b>*</b></span>
        <textarea name="fit_note" required maxlength="180" rows="2" placeholder="It provides executable architecture feedback for design-space exploration."></textarea>
      </label>
      <div class="artifact-submit-two">
        <label>
          <span>Inputs</span>
          <textarea name="inputs" rows="2" placeholder="RTL designs, workload traces, simulator configs"></textarea>
        </label>
        <label>
          <span>Outputs</span>
          <textarea name="outputs" rows="2" placeholder="Performance estimates, verification results, generated RTL"></textarea>
        </label>
      </div>
      <div class="artifact-submit-two">
        <label>
          <span>Evidence produced</span>
          <textarea name="evidence" rows="2" placeholder="Pass/fail checks, timing estimates, benchmark scores"></textarea>
        </label>
        <label>
          <span>Known limitations</span>
          <textarea name="limitations" rows="2" placeholder="Scope boundaries, assumptions, unsupported flows"></textarea>
        </label>
      </div>
    </section>

    <section class="submit-section">
      <h2>Links and citation</h2>
      <div class="artifact-submit-two">
        <label>
          <span>Paper or preprint URL</span>
          <input name="paper_url" type="url" placeholder="Paper or publication URL">
        </label>
        <label>
          <span>Documentation URL</span>
          <input name="docs_url" type="url" placeholder="https://docs.example.org/">
        </label>
      </div>
      <div class="artifact-submit-two">
        <label>
          <span>Artifact URL</span>
          <input name="artifact_url" type="url" placeholder="Code, data, or artifact URL">
        </label>
        <label>
          <span>License</span>
          <input name="license" placeholder="BSD-3-Clause, Apache-2.0, MIT, CC-BY-4.0">
        </label>
      </div>
      <label>
        <span>Citation</span>
        <textarea name="citation" rows="2" placeholder="DOI, BibTeX key, or short citation string"></textarea>
      </label>
      <div class="artifact-submit-two">
        <label>
          <span>Artifact status</span>
          <select name="status">
            <option value="">None</option>
            <option>Active project</option>
            <option>Published artifact</option>
            <option>Preprint or paper artifact</option>
            <option>Prototype</option>
            <option>Dataset or benchmark</option>
            <option>Other</option>
          </select>
        </label>
        <label>
          <span>Maintainer note</span>
          <input name="maintainer_note" placeholder="Anything maintainers should know">
        </label>
      </div>
    </section>

    <div class="submit-actions">
      <button class="site-action submit-button" type="submit">Continue submission <span class="arr" aria-hidden="true">&rarr;</span></button>
      <button class="site-action secondary submit-button" type="button" id="copy-submit-body">Copy generated body</button>
    </div>
  </form>

  <div class="submit-aside">
    <div class="submit-preview-card">
      <h2>Public card preview</h2>
      <div class="submit-card-demo">
        <div class="submit-card-title"><span id="preview-title">Artifact name</span><span>&nearr;</span></div>
        <p id="preview-description">Short description appears here.</p>
        <div class="submit-card-credit">
          <span id="preview-authors">Author(s)</span>
          <span id="preview-institution">Institution(s)</span>
        </div>
        <div class="tool-card-categories">
          <span class="tool-card-category" id="preview-category">Category</span>
          <span class="tool-card-tag" id="preview-tags">tags</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="submit-preview-card">
      <h2>Generated issue body</h2>
      <textarea id="submit-body-preview" readonly rows="16" aria-label="Generated artifact submission body"></textarea>
    </div>

    <div class="submit-preview-card">
      <h2>Other submissions</h2>
      <p>Readings and workshops use the same site-guided GitHub issue to pull request flow.</p>
      <p><a href="/submit-resource.html">Submit a resource</a></p>
      <p><a href="/submit-workshop.html">Submit a workshop</a></p>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
</div>

<script>
window.arch2SubmitConfig = {
  template: "submit_tool.yml",
  titlePrefix: "[Tool]: ",
  titleField: "tool_name",
  titleFallback: "<tool name>",
  labels: [
    ["Tool name", "tool_name"],
    ["Repository or website URL", "url"],
    ["Artifact type", "artifact_type"],
    ["Primary category", "category"],
    ["Suggested category", "category_suggestion"],
    ["Short description", "description"],
    ["Why does this belong in Architecture 2.0?", "fit_note"],
    ["Inputs", "inputs"],
    ["Outputs", "outputs"],
    ["Evidence produced", "evidence"],
    ["Known limitations", "limitations"],
    ["Tags", "tags"],
    ["Author(s)", "authors"],
    ["Institution(s)", "institution"],
    ["Submitted by", "submitted_by"],
    ["Paper or preprint URL", "paper_url"],
    ["Documentation URL", "docs_url"],
    ["Artifact URL", "artifact_url"],
    ["License", "license"],
    ["Citation", "citation"],
    ["Artifact status", "status"],
    ["Maintainer note", "maintainer_note"]
  ],
  preview: [
    ["#preview-title", "tool_name", "Artifact name"],
    ["#preview-description", "description", "Short description appears here."],
    ["#preview-authors", "authors", "Author(s)"],
    ["#preview-institution", "institution", "Institution(s)"],
    ["#preview-category", "category", "Category"],
    ["#preview-tags", "tags", "tags"]
  ]
};
</script>
<script src="submit-form.js"></script>
```
